nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.summary: 内格罗河 (亚马孙河支流)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联38种鸟类，包括肉垂鳳冠雉、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、Lettered aracari等38种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 蓝枕蓝鸦
nodes.summary: 蓝枕蓝鸦（Azure-naped jay，学名 Cyanocorax heilprini），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its preferred habitat is stunted forests, forest edges and second growth on sandy soils in the upper Río Negro basin, as well as in lighter savannah woodland. Two recent surveys of birds Amazon basin found the Azure-naped jay is endemic to areas of white sand forest, and is not found in nearby areas of nearby terra firme forests, seasonally flooded forests and Amazonian savannas.{{cite journal |last1=Borges |first1=Sérgio Henrique |last2=Cornelius |first2=Cintia |last3=Ribas |first3=Camila |last4=Almeida |first4=Ricardo |last5=Guilherme |first5=Edson |last6=Aleixo |first6=Alexandre |last7=Dantas |first7=Sidnei |last8=Santos |first8=Marcos Pérsio Dos |last9=Moreira |first9=Marcelo |title=What is the avifauna of Amazonian white-sand vegetation?
